game_name: Battletoads & Double Dragon: The Ultimate Team

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in source material

special_mechanics.name: Rope/Cable Swinging
special_mechanics.description: Players can swing on ropes and cables, with special attacks like 'BT Bashing Ball' (wrecking-ball-like charge) and 'Swingin' Size Thirteens' (kicks while hanging)

special_mechanics.name: Platform Edge Hanging
special_mechanics.description: New ability to hang off and move across sides of platforms with kicking off enemies. Players can fall and lose a life if enemies step on their fingers

special_mechanics.name: Speeder Bike Riding
special_mechanics.description: Turbo bike sections with backward kick attack ('Bikin' Bash')

special_mechanics.name: Spacecraft Shooter Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Level 4 converts beat 'em up to shooter with player-controlled spacecraft dodging asteroids, mines, and UFOs

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and character abilities but lacks quantified physics parameters. Movement mechanics are described qualitatively through special attacks and abilities rather than numerical values. Engine based directly on original 1991 Battletoads with identical 16-bit port physics.
